message:
fix(backup): skip git push when no remote configured

The JSONL git backup patrol was unconditionally pushing to "origin main",
but the backup repo at ~/.dolt-archive/git has no remote configured and
uses branch "master". This caused every backup cycle to fail and escalate
after 3 consecutive failures.

Now checks for remote existence before pushing, and auto-detects the
current branch name instead of hardcoding "main".

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
